## Summary
Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Affected DCOIR surfaces
- [ ] Collector source / harness
- [ ] Gemini / prompt-pack source
- [ ] Helper-skill source or parity surface
- [ ] GitHub workflow / packaging pipeline
- [ ] Documentation / knowledge surface
- [ ] Governance / control-plane text
- [ ] Other

## Authority and queue check
- [ ] CP-01 and CP-02 were checked if this changes current-state claims.
- [ ] Airtable remains the live authority for queue order, active execution, plans, and testing state.
- [ ] Retired GitHub todo files were not treated as live queue authority.
- [ ] No duplicate editable readable text was introduced across GitHub and Project space.

## Command-lane check
- [ ] Local workstation instructions use Windows PowerShell 5.1 syntax.
- [ ] Elastic endpoint instructions use Elastic Defend response-action syntax.
- [ ] Local and endpoint command lanes are not mixed.
- [ ] Not applicable.

## Validation performed
List exact validation commands, workflow runs, manual checks, or readback verification.

## Evidence / artifacts
Link issues, workflow runs, screenshots, logs, generated bundles, or validation outputs.

## Risk and rollback notes
Describe user/operator impact, security concerns, and manual rollback path if needed.
